HGSS.587.0000:
Hey. I love strong Pokémon.\f
I feed them Protein to crank up
their Attack.
HGSS.587.0001:
I consider myself a bad guy,
but I never liked hanging around\r
other bad ones like Team Rocket.
HGSS.587.0002:
Iron adds to your
Pokémon’s Defense.
HGSS.587.0003:
Team Rocket...
What are you doing here?
HGSS.587.0004:
Some Pokémon evolve only
through trading.\f
I know of four: MACHOKE, KADABRA,
HAUNTER, and, um, GRAVELER.\r
I heard there are others, too.
HGSS.587.0005:
Even Team Rocket wouldn’t steal their
own members’ Pokémon, would they?
HGSS.587.0006:
Let Us Pump Up Your Pokémon!
